subparts.text: Consider the following function: int unknown { int i, j, k = 0 ; for for k = k + n/ 2 ; return k; } What is the time complexity of the function?
Find the minimum number of comparisons required to find the minimum and the maximum of 100 numbers.
A list of n strings, each of length n, is sorted into lexicographic order using the merge-sort algorithm. What is the worst case running time of this computation.
Consider a weighted complete graph G on the vertex set {v1, v2, ..vn} such that the weight of the edge is 2|i−j|. Find the weight of a minimum spanning tree of G in terms of n.
Solve the following recurrence relation: T= √𝑛T+n, for n≥1, = 1, for n=1.
Solve the following recurrence using recursion tree method T= T+T+7n, if n>0 = 1 , if n=0
In quick sort, for sorting n elements, the th element is selected as pivot. Write the algorithm for this quick sort and analyse its complexity.
Find the longest common subsequence of the following sequences using Dynamic Programming. Show all the steps in detail. XYZXY YXZY

Consider a matrix multiplication chain A1A2A3A4 where the matrices A1,A2,A3 and A4 are of dimensions 2 X 25, 25 X 3, 3 X 1, 1 X 1000. Find the parenthesization of A1A2A3A4 that minimizes the total number of scalar multiplications? Show all steps.

Consider the weights and values of items listed below. Item number Weight Value 1 10 60 2 7 28 3 4 20 4 2 24 The task is to pick a subset of these items such that their total weight is no more than 11 Kgs and their total value is maximized. Design a greedy algorithm for this task and find the items and their total value picked by your greedy algorithm. Analyse the complexity of the algorithm.
